title: validateRelations does not surface composition lens cycles
description: validateRelations at packages/pi-context/src/project-context.ts:411 walks relations.json edges and emits edge_cycle_detected via DFS recursion-stack tracking on hierarchy relation_types. Composition lens cycles (lens A members → lens B; lens B members → lens A, expressed in config.json's lens.members[]) are caught only via resolveComposition's internal visited-set which throws composition_cycle_detected (project-context.ts:633) when someone actually invokes resolveComposition. validateRelations does not proactively walk lens.members[] composition graphs; composition cycles surface only on consumer dispatch, not on validation pass.

evidence.reference: validateRelations (line 411) emits 7 codes covering edge integrity (edge_unknown_relation_type, edge_dangling_parent, edge_dangling_child, edge_cycle_detected, etc.). Code list does not include any lens-composition cycle code.

resolveComposition (line ~600) detects sub-lens cycles via internal visited-set + throws composition_cycle_detected. Throw reaches consumers of resolveComposition (loadLensView, lens-view consumers) but does not register as a validateRelations diagnostic.

impact: validateProject + project-validate-relations pi tool report 'clean' on a config with cyclic composition lenses. The cycle surfaces only when a downstream consumer (e.g. /project view <cycling-lens>) invokes loadLensView and resolveComposition throws. Pre-flight validation is not pre-flight for composition integrity.
proposed_resolution: Extend validateRelations (or add a sibling validateLensComposition function dispatched via lens-validator registry per Step 7's lens-validator dispatch) that walks every config.lenses[] entry with kind='composition', resolves member graph via the resolveComposition cycle-detection path, and emits a new SubstrateValidationIssue code (e.g. 'lens_composition_cycle_detected') when a cycle is found. Issue carries the cyclic lens ids. Surfaced by adversarial audit of FGAP-012 closure (commit 3625758).
